name: team3332-mobile
description: Capacitor native wrapper for the TEAM 3332 app (iOS + Android).

scripts.run:ios: node sync-www.mjs && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.run:android: node sync-www.mjs && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android

comment_background_geolocation: Step 2 of the plan (background GPS) adds ONE of these — do not install both. Free/community: @capacitor-community/background-geolocation. Production-grade (paid license, most reliable for a fitness app): @transistorsoft/capacitor-background-geolocation. See SETUP-CAPACITOR.md.
